title: Modern Dataset Size by Season
description: Shows yearly sample size and race count for the 2019-2025 modern historical analysis dataset.

title: Race Outcome Rates by Grid Position
description: Compares win, podium, and top-10 rates for each starting grid position without 2026 data.

title: Qualifying Position and Race Outcome
description: Shows how qualifying position relates to podium rate, top-10 rate, and average finish without 2026 data.

title: Grid Advantage: Historical vs Modern Era
description: Compares grid-position outcome rates between long-run history and the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset.

title: Top 10 Drivers by Total Points
description: Ranks the top drivers in the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset by total points.

title: Top Constructors by Total Points
description: Ranks constructors by total points in the 2019-2025 modern historical dataset.

title: Driver Points Trend, Top 6 Modern Drivers
description: Shows season-by-season point trends for the highest-scoring drivers.

title: Constructor Points Trend, Top 6 Modern Teams
description: Shows season-by-season point trends for leading constructors.

title: Formula 1 Race Count by Year
description: Shows the expansion of the F1 calendar from 1950 to 2018.

title: Historical Top 10 Driver Wins
description: Ranks the top race-winning drivers in the historical SQLite data.

title: Historical Top 10 Constructor Wins
description: Ranks the top race-winning constructors in the historical SQLite data.

title: Circuits with Highest Pole Win Rate
description: Highlights circuits where pole position most often converted to victory without 2026 data.

title: Driver Points Heatmap, Top 10 Drivers
description: Shows year-by-year points for the top modern drivers as a compact heatmap.

title: Constructor Points Share, Top 6 Teams
description: Shows how leading teams' point totals changed relative to each other over time.

title: Constructor Podiums and Wins
description: Compares podium counts and wins by constructor in the modern historical period.

title: Driver Podiums and Wins
description: Compares podium counts and wins by driver in the modern historical period.

title: Race Result Status Mix by Season
description: Shows the share of finished, lapped, and other race statuses by season.

title: Average Position Change by Circuit
description: Contrasts circuits where drivers tend to gain or lose positions from start to finish.

title: Qualifying Position vs Finish Position Heatmap
description: Shows the joint distribution of qualifying position and final race position.

title: Constructor Championship Rank Bump Chart
description: Shows how leading constructor ranking changed across seasons.

title: Circuit Grid Importance Bubble Chart
description: Compares circuits by pole win rate, position-change volatility, race count, and grid-finish correlation.

title: Driver Performance and Consistency
description: Compares drivers by average finish, finish variability, podium rate, and average points.

title: Constructor Qualifying-to-Race Efficiency
description: Compares teams' average grid position with average finish position, sized by podium rate.

title: Race Position Change Distribution
description: Shows how often drivers gained or lost positions relative to their grid starts.

title: Feature Correlation Heatmap
description: Summarizes correlations between race features and finish, podium, and top-10 outcomes.

title: Constructor Points Concentration by Season
description: Shows how much of each season's constructor points were captured by the top teams.

title: Constructor Championship Concentration Index
description: Uses HHI and effective constructor count to measure season-level competitive concentration.

title: Pre-Race Strength and Podium Rate
description: Shows whether pre-race standings and recent form separate podium probability.

title: Circuit Grid Importance Score
description: Ranks circuits by a composite score using pole win rate, front-3 podium rate, and grid-finish correlation.

title: Top Driver Average Position Gains
description: Ranks drivers by average race position gain from grid to finish.

title: Top Constructor Average Position Gains
description: Ranks constructors by average race position gain from grid to finish.
